name: paperclip-plugin-phone-tools
description: Paperclip plugin that lets agents make and receive AI-driven phone calls via the operator's 3CX PBX. Engine-pluggable: ships with Vapi (managed) in v0.1.0; DIY (jambonz + OpenAI Realtime) lands in v0.2.0. Multi-account, per-account company isolation, mutations gated.
author: Barry Carr & Tony Allard
